title: phlox × rugelii
intro: Phlox × rugelii, also known as fragrant phlox or woodland phlox, is a hybrid species of flowering plant in the phlox family, native to North America. The roots and flowers of this plant have been used in traditional medicine for their medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Phlox × rugelii include reducing fever, soothing respiratory issues, and alleviating menstrual cramps. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and it is also used in aromatherapy to promote relaxation and reduce stress.
